Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Kendra Crawford. Attorney Bill Ford appearing for Plaintiff.
Defendant Tera Gray is present.
Attorney Cari Becker Maas representing the defendant through limited scope.

Litigants confer in D501.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JAN-09-2012 is vacated.
